req.title: System-Admin views department
req.statement: An authenticated system-admin shall be able to view a department through the UI form. Mandatory fields must be validated and an audit record must be written on success.

doc.reasoning: R-WEB-008 mandates that an authenticated system-admin can view a department via UI form with mandatory field validation and audit logging. The test suite covers: (1) positive case validating successful department retrieval with audit record (EP: valid admin role); (2) negative case for unauthenticated access (NEG: 401 response); (3) negative case for forbidden role (DT: role-based access control); (4) boundary case for minimal valid department entity (BVA: minimum data set). All tests are deterministic, idempotent, and traceable to R-WEB-008 acceptance criteria.

tests.name: test_system_admin_views_department_success
preconditions: Department with id=dept_001 exists in system
actions: POST /departments endpoint with GET method to retrieve dept_001
Query audit log for write event on department view
expected: Response body contains department name and mandatory fields
Audit log contains entry with action=VIEW, resource=department, status=SUCCESS
trace: R-WEB-008: audit record written on success
tests.executable:
import requests
import json
from datetime import datetime

def test_system_admin_views_department_success():
    auth_token = <fixture_admin_token>
    headers = {'Authorization': f'Bearer {auth_token}'}
    
    resp = requests.get(
        'http://localhost:8080/departments/dept_001',
        headers=headers
    )
    
    assert resp.status_code == 200
    data = resp.json()
    assert data['id'] == 'dept_001'
    assert 'name' in data
    assert 'description' in data
    
    audit_resp = requests.get(
        'http://localhost:8080/audit?resource=department&resource_id=dept_001',
        headers=headers
    )
    audit_entries = audit_resp.json()['entries']
    assert any(e['action'] == 'VIEW' and e['status'] == 'SUCCESS' 
               for e in audit_entries)

tests.name: test_view_department_unauthenticated_returns_401
actions: Send GET request to /departments/dept_002 without authorization header
expected: Response body contains error message indicating authentication required
trace: R-WEB-008: audit record NOT written on failure
tests.executable:
import requests

def test_view_department_unauthenticated_returns_401():
    resp = requests.get(
        'http://localhost:8080/departments/dept_002'
    )
    
    assert resp.status_code == 401
    data = resp.json()
    assert 'error' in data
    assert 'authentication' in data['error'].lower()

tests.name: test_view_department_forbidden_role_returns_403
expected: Response body contains error indicating insufficient permissions
trace: R-WEB-008: error pathway 403 if role forbidden
R-WEB-008: role:admin required for department view
tests.executable:
import requests

def test_view_department_forbidden_role_returns_403():
    viewer_token = <fixture_viewer_token>
    headers = {'Authorization': f'Bearer {viewer_token}'}
    
    resp = requests.get(
        'http://localhost:8080/departments/dept_003',
        headers=headers
    )
    
    assert resp.status_code == 403
    data = resp.json()
    assert 'error' in data
    assert 'permission' in data['error'].lower()

tests.name: test_view_department_minimal_valid_entity
preconditions: Department with minimal required fields exists (id, name only)
actions: Verify mandatory fields are present and validated
expected: Response contains name (non-empty string, min length 1)
Audit record written with minimal entity data
trace: R-WEB-008: mandatory fields must be validated
R-WEB-008: boundary case for minimum valid department
tests.executable:
import requests

def test_view_department_minimal_valid_entity():
    auth_token = <fixture_admin_token>
    headers = {'Authorization': f'Bearer {auth_token}'}
    
    resp = requests.get(
        'http://localhost:8080/departments/dept_min',
        headers=headers
    )
    
    assert resp.status_code == 200
    data = resp.json()
    assert len(data['id']) > 0
    assert len(data['name']) > 0
    
    audit_resp = requests.get(
        'http://localhost:8080/audit?resource_id=dept_min',
        headers=headers
    )
    assert audit_resp.status_code == 200

tests.name: test_view_department_validation_missing_mandatory_field
preconditions: Department exists with missing mandatory field (e.g., no name)
expected: Response contains validation error detailing missing field
trace: R-WEB-008: mandatory fields must be validated
R-WEB-008: error pathway 400 on validation error
tests.executable:
import requests

def test_view_department_validation_missing_mandatory_field():
    auth_token = <fixture_admin_token>
    headers = {'Authorization': f'Bearer {auth_token}'}
    
    resp = requests.get(
        'http://localhost:8080/departments/dept_invalid',
        headers=headers
    )
    
    assert resp.status_code == 400
    data = resp.json()
    assert 'validation' in data.get('error', '').lower()
    assert 'name' in data.get('error', '').lower()
